name: Lemon Squares
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together 1 cup butter, 2 cups flour, and 1/2 cup powdered sugar until well combined.
2. Press the mixture into a 13" x 9-inch pan to form a crust.
3. Bake at 350°F for 15-20 minutes.
4. Filling: Mix all other ingredients together to make filling. Use REAL lemon juice.
5. Pour the filling over the crust.
6. Return to oven and bake again at 350°F for 20-25 minutes.
7. Allow to cool completely before sprinkling with powdered sugar.
8. Cut into small squares.
